handoffActions.label: Call 112
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response for an exposed live wire or immediate electrical danger.

handoffActions.label: Call BMC 1916
handoffActions.description: Notify the BMC central control room after moving away from the hazard.

handoffActions.label: Call 112
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response for sparking or an electrical short circuit creating immediate danger.

handoffActions.label: Call BMC 1916
handoffActions.description: Notify the BMC central control room after moving away from the hazard.

handoffActions.label: Open Mumbai Police online complaint
handoffActions.description: Use this official form only for a minor or non-emergency complaint; report a major crime at a police station.

handoffActions.label: Call 112
handoffActions.description: Call emergency response if damaged or stolen cable creates immediate danger.

handoffActions.label: Call 112
handoffActions.description: Leave the unsafe area and call emergency response for imminent collapse risk.

handoffActions.label: Call BMC 1916
handoffActions.description: Notify the BMC central control room after moving to safety.

handoffActions.label: Call 112 for immediate danger
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response when a crime or safety threat is in progress or someone is at immediate risk.

handoffActions.label: Open Mumbai Police online complaint
handoffActions.description: Use this official form only for a minor or non-emergency complaint; report a major crime at a police station.

handoffActions.label: Call Women Helpline 181
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Women Helpline for protection and support.

handoffActions.label: Call Women Helpline 181
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Women Helpline for protection and support.

handoffActions.label: Call Women Helpline 181
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Women Helpline for protection and support.

handoffActions.label: Call Child Helpline 1098
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Child Helpline for a child-protection concern.

handoffActions.label: Call Cybercrime Helpline 1930
handoffActions.description: Call 1930 promptly for cyber-enabled financial fraud or urgent cybercrime assistance.

handoffActions.label: Open the Cyber Crime Reporting Portal
handoffActions.description: Continue on the official national portal to report cybercrime.

handoffActions.label: Call 112 now
handoffActions.description: Move to safety and contact emergency response. JagrukSetu is not an emergency dispatch service.

handoffActions.label: Call BMC 1916
handoffActions.description: Contact the BMC central control room for municipal emergency coordination.

handoffActions.label: Open Maharashtra grievance support
handoffActions.description: Continue on the official state grievance portal for social-support and administrative service issues.

handoffActions.label: Call Child Helpline 1098
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Child Helpline for a child-protection concern.

handoffActions.label: Call Child Helpline 1098
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Child Helpline for a child-protection concern.

handoffActions.label: Call Women Helpline 181
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Women Helpline for protection and support.

handoffActions.label: Call Women Helpline 181
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Women Helpline for protection and support.

handoffActions.label: Call Child Helpline 1098
handoffActions.description: Contact the Maharashtra Child Helpline for a child-protection concern.

handoffActions.label: Call 112 for immediate danger
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response when trafficking is in progress or someone is at immediate risk.

handoffActions.label: Call 112 for immediate danger
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response when a person is at immediate risk of self-harm.

handoffActions.label: Call 112 for immediate danger
handoffActions.description: Use emergency response when exploitation is in progress or someone is at immediate risk.

handoffActions.label: Open Maharashtra ACB complaint
handoffActions.description: Continue on the independent Maharashtra Anti-Corruption Bureau complaint portal.

handoffActions.label: Call Maharashtra ACB 1064
handoffActions.description: Contact the independent Maharashtra Anti-Corruption Bureau toll-free helpline.
